feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Turning Galaxy Rotation Curves into Radial Cosmic Chronometers: A Nexus Paradigm Approach
entry.content:
Authors: S Marongwe, SA Kauffman - arXiv preprint arXiv:2604.17597, 2026

Abstract: We present a method for transforming galaxy rotation curves into radially resolved dynamical chronometers, enabling reconstruction of galaxy assembly histories directly from kinematic data. Within the Nexus Paradigm, the baryonic Tully-Fisher ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: stuart kauffman (keyword alert)

entry.title: When energy is scarce, evolution selects dormancy
entry.content:
Authors: CPKempes- Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, 2026

Abstract: Endospores represent one of the most fascinating strategies among bacteria. As resources become scarce, certain species are able to produce a dormant state in which a thick proteinaceous coat protects the core genome along with a small ...

Alert: Chris Kempes (keyword alert)

entry.content:

entry.title: Defining "Life"

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:

entry.title: Engineering Saccharomyces boulardii for Enhanced Protein Surface Display and Biologics Delivery

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: L Xu

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Emerging research on Saccharomyces boulardii (Sb) has highlighted its probiotic and prebiotic properties, exploiting its secretion and surface display capabilities to ameliorate gut conditions. This research contributes to the field through a multi-faceted ...

entry.title: Emergence of Continents Stabilized the Bioavailability of Boron

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: BV Dyck, J Wade - Terra Nova, 2026

Abstract: Boron is an essential element for the development of life on Earth; borates stabilize ribose in prebiotic reactions and facilitate metabolism in higher plants. There is, however, a relatively narrow surface boron concentration range over which borates ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.content:

entry.title: Sago as a Prebiotic to Increase Short-chain Fatty Acid Production in The Digestive Tract

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: CA Ariestanti, JA Wijaya - Food ScienTech Journal, 2026

Abstract: ... its potential as a prebiotic . This review examines the characteristics and potential of sago-derived RS as a prebiotic , particularly its role in ... Studies indicate that sago contains high levels of RS, with a prebiotic index (PI) value of +12.19, higher than ...

entry.title: Proton Irradiation of Primitive Atmospheres of Young Exoplanets and Early Earth: N2O Greenhouse Warming and Prebiotic Synthesis

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: K Kobayashi, VS Airapetian, T Udo, S Mouri... - The Astrophysical Journal ..., 2026

Abstract: The emergence of habitable conditions on the early Earth and on rocky exoplanets requires persistent energy sources that can drive both prebiotic chemistry and climate warming under magnetically active young G–M stars. To quantify the ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

Alert: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ... (keyword alert)

entry.title: Evolvable AI: Threats of a new major transition in evolution
entry.content:
Authors: V Müller, L Steels, ESzathmáry- Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, 2026

Abstract: Evolvable AI (eAI), ie, AI systems whose components, learning rules, and deployment conditions can themselves undergo Darwinian evolution, may soon emerge from current trends in generative, agentic, and embodied AI. We argue that ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: Eörs Szathmáry (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence of rigid Polycrystals from atomistic Systems with general Interactions
entry.content:
Authors: L Kreutz, T Ziereis -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.19239, 2026

Abstract: We investigate the formation of polycrystalline structures in a class of particle systems. The atomistic energy is modeled as a sum of particle energies that favor atoms being locally isometric to a reference lattice. The discrete frame invariant ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: On the Emergence of Syntax by Means of Local Interaction
entry.content:
Authors: Z Wei -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.17857, 2026

Abstract: Can syntactic processing emerge spontaneously from purely local interaction? We present a concrete instance on a minimal system: an 18,658-parameter two-dimensional neural cellular automaton (NCA), supervised by nothing more than a 1-bit boundary ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence of Multiple Crossing Limit Cycles in Planar Piecewise Systems with Isochronous Centers and Nonsmooth Switching Manifolds
entry.content:
Authors: SIR Alva, PIS Navarro -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.19483, 2026

Abstract: Discontinuous piecewise differential systems exhibit dynamical behaviors with no counterpart in smooth systems, particularly in the presence of nonsmooth switching structures. In this work, we extend previous results for systems separated by a ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: From Flow to Form: Emergence of the Cytokinetic Ring via Active Cortical Dynamics
entry.content:
Authors: S Mukherjee, A Sain -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.17349, 2026

Abstract: During cell division active flows occur in the cortex, a thin layer of gel like network of acto myosin filaments, beneath the cell surface. The cortical flow and the associated stresses bring about change in the cell shape, in particular a sharp invagination at ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Audio-DeepThinker: Progressive Reasoning-Aware Reinforcement Learning for High-Quality Chain-of-Thought Emergence in Audio Language Models
entry.content:
Authors: X He, C Li, J Wang, Y Rong, T Xie, W Wang, L Liu... -arXivpreprintarXiv..., 2026

Abstract: ... The emergence of reasoning suggests that the bottleneck in audio reasoning lies not in model architecture, but in the lack of reward ... The combined supervision from format, consistency, and similarity rewards provides dense guidance during this ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity
